title: John R. Wood Properties  ransomware incident

extortion.description: Founded in 1958, John R. Wood Properties is a global real estate company headquartered in Naples, FL. John R. Wood Properties corporate office is located in 9130 Corsea Del Fontana Way, Naples, Florida, 34109, United States and has 1,242 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 1.07 TB
